items.title: India AI Impact Summit 2026: Landmark Global Declaration and Major AI Investment Commitments
items.snippet: Press Release:Press Information Bureau Ministry of Electronics & IT India AI Impact Summit 2026: Landmark Global Declaration and Major AI Investment Commitments Posted On: 02 MAR 2026 10:09AM by PIB Delhi The India AI Impact Summit 2026, held from 16–21 February 2026, marked a significant milestone in the global artificial intelligence landscape. items.title: NITI Aayog Conducts National Workshop on Natural Farming under State Support Mission
items.snippet: Press Release:Press Information Bureau NITI Aayog NITI Aayog Conducts National Workshop on Natural Farming under State Support Mission Posted On: 02 MAR 2026 2:13PM by PIB Delhi NITI Aayog organized a two-day national workshop on Natural Farming under its State Support Mission (SSM), bringing together farmers, policymakers, scientists, start-ups and civil society organizations from across the country. items.title: Advancing Self-Reliance and Export Resilience: India’s Growing Global Footprint
